Title: Mojic: Observable Timing Discrepancy in HMAC Verification
Description: The `CipherEngine` in Mojic v2.1.3 uses a standard equality operator (`!==`) to verify the HMAC-SHA256 integrity seal during the decryption phase. This creates an Observable Timing Discrepancy (CWE-208), allowing a potential attacker to bypass the file integrity check via a timing attack.
